# Calcento — Free Pay & Workplace Calculators
# https://www.calcento.com
# llms.txt v1 — https://llmstxt.org

> Calcento provides free, browser-based calculators for workplace math: pay raises, overtime pay, employee turnover, cost of turnover, and PTO accrual. All calculations run client-side — no account required. Results are estimates for general guidance and are not financial, legal, or tax advice.

## Calculators

- [Pay Raise Calculator](https://www.calcento.com/pay-raise-calculator): Calculate a raise by percentage or dollar amount, or compare two salaries to find the percentage increase.
- [Overtime Pay Calculator](https://www.calcento.com/overtime-pay-calculator): Compute gross overtime pay using regular and overtime hours and an hourly rate.
- [Employee Turnover Calculator](https://www.calcento.com/employee-turnover-calculator): Measure employee turnover rate from headcount and separations over a period.
- [Cost of Turnover Calculator](https://www.calcento.com/cost-of-turnover-calculator): Estimate the total cost of replacing an employee, including recruiting, onboarding, and lost productivity.
- [PTO Accrual Calculator](https://www.calcento.com/pto-accrual-calculator): Calculate how much paid time off an employee has accrued based on accrual rate and hours worked.
